# DoorOpen

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::DoorOpen;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        DoorOpen { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
entrance, entry, exit, ingress, egress, gate, gateway, emergency exit

## Categories
home, travel, security

[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/door-open)
